recent.statement: A major oil tanker will pass through the Bab el-Mandeb Strait within the next week
recent.evidence: The only Bab el-Mandeb signal shows a critical chokepoint status with LIVE SHIPS: 0, confirming no tanker transit was captured rather than a major oil tanker passing through.

recent.statement: Donald Trump will announce that Jon Ossof and Raphael Warnock are illegitimate Senators by the end of the week
recent.evidence: No captured signal shows Trump making such an announcement, and an event this notable would have been captured within the window.

recent.statement: A significant earthquake will occur in the South Sandwich Islands within the next week
recent.evidence: The only signal shows an M4.9 quake, which does not meet the threshold for a 'significant' earthquake in the South Sandwich Islands.

recent.statement: S&P 500 futures will dip below 7450 due to geopolitical risk premium
recent.evidence: No signal reports the S&P 500 futures level; only Nasdaq 100 futures (S13) is shown, so no evidence confirms a dip below 7450.

recent.statement: Kerch Strait ship transits will drop below 1/day due to intensified Ukrainian conflict
recent.evidence: Kerch Strait shows 2 daily transits, which is not below the forecast threshold of 1/day.

recent.statement: Natural gas prices (Henry Hub) will rise by 2.5-3.5% following the EIA storage report on 2026-07-23
recent.evidence: The only natural gas signal (S12) shows Henry Hub at $2.9/MMBtu down 0.62%, a decline rather than the predicted 2.5-3.5% rise.

recent.statement: The US will launch another round of strikes on Iran within the next week.
recent.evidence: No captured signal shows a US strike on Iran during the window, and such an event would certainly have been captured.

recent.statement: Kerch Strait ship transits will drop below 1/day due to intensified Ukrainian conflict
recent.evidence: Kerch Strait shows 2 daily ship transits, which is above the forecast threshold of below 1/day.

recent.statement: The price of oil will rise by at least $1 per barrel within the next week due to increased tensions in the Middle East
recent.evidence: The current WTI snapshot shows oil at 90.79 $/bbl down 1.52% (and Brent down 1.35%), with no signal showing the required $1 per barrel rise during the window.

recent.statement: VIX fear gauge will spike to 18.5 due to renewed Gaza conflict escalation.
recent.evidence: S1 confirms ongoing Gaza conflict but provides no VIX data showing a spike to 18.5, which such a market move would require.
No captured signal concerns this forecast, so there is no evidence that NG=F closed 0.5% lower within the window.

recent.statement: Kerch Strait ship transits will drop to 1/day due to intensified Ukrainian conflict.
recent.evidence: Kerch Strait shows 2 daily transits, not the forecasted drop to 1/day, so the specific threshold was not met.

self_calibration.note: Published headline probability is RAW conviction (unchanged); this is the honest companion. Calibration fixes overconfidence, not discrimination — see /calibration.
